name: Ooze Odyssey
author: Poki
description: Ooze Odyssey is a platform game that invites you to navigate a world filled with puzzles, slime, and fruits! Play as a slime snake, you need to move your slimy body strategically to reach the exit. Be cautious not to slip off the slick path. Eat the fruits on the road to become bigger. The best part? You can build your own level! Create your gooey puzzle and challenge your friends to see if they can solve it! How to play Ooze Odyssey? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Restart: R Who created Ooze Odyssey? Ooze Odyssey is created by Art Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Ooze Odyssey for free? You can play Ooze Odyssey for free on Poki. Can I play Ooze Odyssey on mobile devices and desktop? Ooze Odyssey can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
